# Install My Kitchen

> Independent kitchen installation service covering Coventry, Warwickshire and surrounding areas.

Install My Kitchen is an independent kitchen installation company based in Coundon, Coventry. We install kitchens purchased from all major UK retailers including Wren, Howdens, Magnet, IKEA, Wickes, B&Q, Benchmarx and more. We are not affiliated with any retailer.

## Services
- Cabinet assembly and installation
- Worktop supply and fitting
- Appliance and sink installation
- Door, drawer and panel fitting
- Handles and ironmongery
- Snagging and adjustments
- Optional: flooring, tiling, decorating

## Contact
- Address: 242 Hollyfast Road, Coundon, Coventry, CV6 2AH
- Phone: 07399 651836
- Email: info@installmykitchen.co.uk
- Website: https://www.installmykitchen.co.uk

## Areas Covered
Coventry, Canley, Tile Hill, Earlsdon, Allesley, Binley, Wyken, Walsgrave, Finham, Stivichall, Coundon, Radford, Rugby, Nuneaton, Bedworth, Hinckley, Leamington Spa, Kenilworth, Warwick, Balsall Common, Meriden, Solihull, Stratford-upon-Avon, Southam, Atherstone
